headline: Stryker (SYK) Is Up 8.5% After Broad Russell Growth Index Removal Reshapes Its Shareholder Base
summary: On 27 June 2026, Stryker Corporation was removed from multiple Russell growth indexes, including the Russell 1000 Growth, Russell 3000 Growth, Russell Top 200 Growth, and Russell 3000E Growth benchmarks. This broad index removal matters because it can trigger compulsory selling by index-tracking funds, reshaping who owns Stryker shares and how they trade. Next, we’ll examine how Stryker’s removal from several Russell growth benchmarks could influence its existing investment narrative and...

headline: Stryker (SYK) Stock Weighs DCF Upside Against High P/E After Recent Price Rebound
summary: If you are wondering whether Stryker stock is offering fair value or a potential opportunity right now, the key is understanding what the current price is actually reflecting. The stock last closed at US$330.52, with returns of 8.5% over the past week and 8.3% over the past month, while the return year to date is down 5.1% and the return over the past year is down 15.6%. Recent headlines around Stryker have kept the stock on many investors' watchlists, as the company continues to sit at the...
